responsibilities: Create detailed 3D BIM models in Revit based on architectural, structural, and MEP design documents
Produce accurate construction drawings, details, and annotations to support permitting and construction documentation needs
Convert point cloud scan data into accurate as-built BIM models to support renovation and retrofit projects
Update and maintain BIM models throughout project phases to reflect design changes and field revisions
Perform quality assurance checks on models to verify dimensional accuracy and compliance with modeling standards
Generate quantity take-offs and material schedules directly from BIM models to support cost estimating
Collaborate with engineers and designers to incorporate design changes into model updates within established timelines
Create and customize Revit families and components to support project-specific modeling requirements
